startup_tip_donate: ❤️  SecureShare is a free open-source project. Support development: {donate_url}
startup_tip_encryption: 🔒  Your files are protected by AES-256-GCM encryption. The server never sees your data.
startup_tip_reconnect: 🔄  If the connection drops, the transfer will automatically resume from where it stopped.
startup_tip_github: ⭐  Like SecureShare? Star us on GitHub: {github_url}
startup_tip_archive: 🚀  Tip: for multiple files, pack them into a single archive (ZIP/RAR).
startup_tip_verify: 🛡️  Always check the verification code — it protects against man-in-the-middle (MITM) attacks.
startup_tip_coffee: ☕  Development and the server cost money. Buy the author a coffee: {donate_url}
send_code_hint: Share this code with the recipient
recv_enter_code: Enter the session code from the sender:
file_size_warning: ⚠️ File exceeds the {max_size} limit. Transfer may be interrupted by the server.
msgbox_file_body: Please choose a file to send.
msgbox_large_file_body:
File ({file_size}) exceeds the server limit ({max_size}).

Transfer may be interrupted.
Continue?
msgbox_code_body: Enter the session code from the sender.
msgbox_folder_body: Choose a folder to save to.
donate_msg_send: ☕ Like SecureShare? Buy the developer a coffee —
donate_msg_recv: ☕ SecureShare is a free service. Support the development:
help_send_body:
1.  Open the "Send" tab
2.  Click "Browse" and select a file
3.  Click "Send" — the app will generate a session code
4.  Share this code with the recipient (📋 button)
5.  Wait for the recipient to connect
6.  Confirm the verification code
7.  Transfer will start automatically
help_recv_body:
1.  Open the "Receive" tab
2.  Enter the session code from the sender
3.  Choose a save folder
4.  Click "Receive"
5.  Confirm the verification code
6.  The file will be saved to the specified folder
help_verify_body:
After connecting, both devices will display
the same 8-character code (XXXX-XXXX).

✅ Codes match → click "Codes match"
❌ Codes differ → click "Cancel" and try again

This protects against man-in-the-middle (MITM) attacks.
help_security_body:
•  Encryption: AES-256-GCM (end-to-end)
•  Key exchange: X25519 (Diffie-Hellman)
•  The server NEVER sees your data
•  Session code is single-use
help_limits_body:
•  Maximum size: {max_gb} GB per session
•  One file per session (for multiple → archive)
•  Internet required on both devices
•  For large files — split with an archiver
help_reconnect_body:
If the connection drops during a transfer,
the app automatically reconnects
(up to 5 attempts: 5s, 10s, 20s, 40s, 60s) and resumes from where it stopped.

Verification is skipped on reconnect —
the app remembers the session via a token.

If reconnect fails:
1.  Sender selects THE SAME file
2.  Clicks «Send» (new code)
3.  Receiver enters the new code
4.  Transfer continues (resume)

⏱ Progress is saved for 7 days.
help_troubleshoot_body:
•  No connection → check your internet
•  Transfer interrupted → resume (see above)
•  Diagnostics → "Copy log" / "Save log"
•  Stop transfer → "Cancel" button

💡 If the issue persists, try updating the app
(🔄 in the toolbar) or download the latest
version from the official website:
help_autoupdate_body:
The app automatically checks for updates
on every launch. If a new version is found —
a dialog will appear with the changelog.

•  🔄 Update now — download and install
•  ⏩ Skip — ignore this version
•  Later — remind next time

Updates are verified via SHA-256.
The 🔄 button in the header — manual check.
help_donate_body:
SecureShare is a free open-source project.
Development and server cost money.

The ❤️ button in the header opens the
support page on Ko-fi.

Even a small donation helps keep the
relay server online and the project growing.
verify_prompt:
Make sure both participants
see the same code:
verify_warning:
⚠ If codes differ — the connection may be
intercepted by an attacker (MITM)!
relay_incompatible: ❌ Incompatible peer version (protocol v{peer_proto}, need v{min_proto}+). Ask the peer to update.
relay_peer_newer: ⚠️ Peer has a newer version (v{peer_app}). We recommend updating.
relay_verify_confirmed: ✅ Verification confirmed, waiting for peer's confirmation...
relay_file_too_large: ❌ File size ({size} GB) exceeds limit ({limit} GB)
relay_progress_saved: 💾 Progress saved: {received}/{total} chunks — can be resumed
updater_blocked_archive:
Auto-update unavailable: the app is running from an archive or a temporary folder.

Extract SecureShare.zip to a separate folder and run it from there.
updater_sha_missing: SHA256SUMS.txt does not contain an entry for this file
lang_changed_restart: Language changed. Please restart the app.
